utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Now, checking the final package: (1) destination: included and fully specified ('Lisbon, Portugal'); (2) travel_dates: included and fully specified ('2024-06-20 to 2024-06-24'); (3) transportation: included and fully specified with flight type, price, and currency; (4) accommodation: included and fully specified (hotel name, type, nights, price, total, currency, child-friendly); (5) activities: included, with names, prices, and currencies; (6) additional_services: included with description, price, and currency; (7) total_budget: included with detailed cost breakdown and total. Therefore, all 7 items are covered and fully specified.
